title: OWL Cyber Capture the Flag (CTF) Challenge
description: Put your hacking skills to the test in our Spring CTF! Compete against other members in web exploitation, cryptography, reverse engineering, and more.

title: Virtual Cybersec Roadmap with Ashish Ghimire
description: Ashish Ghimire will guide us through a comprehensive roadmap for getting started in cybersecurity, exploring potential career paths and key certifications.

title: Intro to WireShark
description: Learn the basics of network traffic analysis using Wireshark. We will cover packet capturing, filtering, and identifying basic network events. Great for beginners!

title: Connect @ KSU - Spring 2026 Kickoff
location: Joe Mack Wilson Student Center - Room 216
description: Come grab some food, chat with the executive board, and learn about our Spring 2026 initiatives, hands-on workshops, and upcoming competitions.

title: Fall 2025 Kickoff - Game Night
description: Welcome to the new semester! Join us for a fun game night to kick off Fall 2025, meet fellow club members, and learn about the amazing activities we have planned.
